title: Security: UAF when code runs after NavigationThrottle's Resume() or CancelDeferredNavigation() are called
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
The function `NavigationRequest::RendererCancellationWindowEnded` runs the callback renderer_cancellation_window_ended_callback_ at line [1]. And the renderer_cancellation_window_ended_callback_ is `RendererCancellationThrottle::NavigationCancellationWindowEnded`, which
